title: thelypteris × rolandii
intro: Thelypteris × rolandii is a hybrid plant species in the family Thelypteridaceae, resulting from the cross between Thelypteris torresiana and Thelypteris rolandii. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris × rolandii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Thelypteris × rolandii can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and is also used in some traditional herbal remedies for its purported medicinal effects.
